description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: tests and checks. In the tests stage add a test job that caches the .coverage file with key $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME (including untracked files), stores .coverage as an artifact, and runs pip3 install -r requirements.txt then python3-coverage run --source=src -m unittest discover -s tests/ -v. In the checks stage add a coverage job that runs python3-coverage report, and a type_checking job that is allowed to fail and runs mypy src/*.py --ignore-missing-import. Use the default Docker image and no additional services.
